_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Operators "shall not place relevant products on the market or export them without prior submission of a due diligence statement."
prior.source_span: Operators shall not place relevant products on the market or export them without prior submission of a due diligence statement.
